message:
Add genome comparison package with statistical analysis algorithms

Introduce @phage-explorer/comparison, a new package providing
alignment-free genome comparison using sophisticated statistical
metrics from information theory, k-mer analysis, and rank correlation.

Package Structure:
- types.ts: Comprehensive TypeScript interfaces for all metrics
- kmer-analysis.ts: K-mer frequency-based comparison algorithms
- information-theory.ts: Shannon entropy and divergence measures
- rank-correlation.ts: Non-parametric statistical tests

K-mer Analysis (kmer-analysis.ts):
- extractKmerSet/extractKmerFrequencies: K-mer extraction utilities
- jaccardIndex: Set overlap |A ∩ B| / |A ∪ B|
- containmentIndex: Asymmetric containment for size-disparate genomes
- cosineSimilarity: Frequency vector angle similarity
- brayCurtisDissimilarity: Ecological distance metric
- extractCanonicalKmerSet: Reverse-complement aware extraction
- minHashJaccard: O(n) approximate Jaccard for large sequences
- multiResolutionKmerAnalysis: Multi-k analysis (k=3,5,7,11)

Information Theory (information-theory.ts):
Based on Shannon (1948) and Cover & Thomas (2006):
- shannonEntropy: H(X) = -Σ p(x) log₂(p(x))
- sequenceEntropy: K-mer based entropy estimation
- kullbackLeiblerDivergence: KL(P||Q) asymmetric divergence
- jensenShannonDivergence: JSD symmetric, sqrt is proper metric
- mutualInformation: I(X;Y) = H(X) + H(Y) - H(X,Y)
- normalizedMutualInformation: NMI ∈ [0,1]
- entropyProfile: Sliding window entropy for conservation analysis
- normalizedCompressionDistance: NCD approximation via entropy

Rank Correlation (rank-correlation.ts):
Based on Spearman (1904), Kendall (1938), Hoeffding (1948):
- spearmanRho: Rank correlation with tie handling
- kendallTau: Concordance-based correlation (tau-b for ties)
- hoeffdingD: Detects non-linear dependence
- spearmanPValue/kendallPValue: Statistical significance
- interpretCorrelationStrength: Qualitative interpretation

Type Definitions (types.ts):
- KmerAnalysis: Complete k-mer comparison results
- InformationTheoryMetrics: Entropy and divergence measures
- RankCorrelationMetrics: Correlation coefficients with p-values
- EditDistanceMetrics: Levenshtein with operation breakdown
- BiologicalMetrics: ANI, GC content, genome size comparison
- CodonUsageComparison: RSCU, CAI, chi-square analysis
- AminoAcidComparison: AA frequency similarity by property
- GeneContentComparison: Gene-level overlap analysis
- GenomeComparisonResult: Complete comparison aggregate
- ComparisonConfig: Configurable analysis parameters

This package enables the planned genome comparison feature in the TUI,
allowing users to see detailed statistical similarity metrics between
any two phages in the database.

References:
- Zielezinski et al. (2017) "Alignment-free sequence comparison"
- Zielezinski et al. (2019) "Benchmarking of alignment-free methods"
